message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class PatientStudioDriver { }
interface IMutationCommand <<I>>{ }


PatientAdapter -[hidden]-> StudyAdapter : 
StudyAdapter --|> UpdateItemCommand 

package "Proxy" #LightGray {
    [<<C>>\n<font color=black>Patient</font><b>Adapter\ninterviews] as PA
    
}



PA --> PatientStudioDriver 


note right of PA:: interviews  
getInterviewItems(pageSet)   
end note  

studyadapter = "[<<C>>\n<font color=black>Study</font><b>Adapter \n start(command,...args)\ngetInterviewItems(pageSet)\nappl(interviewitems)]as SA"




SA--> StudioStudioDriver 



updateitemcommand="[UpdateItemCommand(start(study,page,index))]"

IMutationCommand <|-- updateitemcommand  


apply="appl(interview items)"
save =" save( study , patient,interview )"

patientstudio driver -> interview studio driver  





@enduml
